response.name: The Residential Strip
response.ambient: A side road branching off the square. A row of houses along its length, doors mostly closed, curtains mostly drawn. One chimney smokes faintly; the others are cold. The cobblestones here are slightly

obvious_edges.name: out
obvious_edges.description: Back to the square — the fountain, the sitter, the cobblestones.

obvious_edges.name: off
obvious_edges.description: A half-finished building set back from the road. Three walls, a roof, no door.

response.active_state_text: The houses sit closed. One chimney smokes faintly. No one is on the road. The curtains in the third house twitch as you walk past — or you imagine they do.
